zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel於1515年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德阿爾布藍德斯瓦阿特時，他的父親Doen Beijensz van Driel81歲，母親Haesken77歲。他與Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven在荷蘭藍德布盧易尼茲培結婚。他們至少是12個女兒的父母。他去世於1591年在荷蘭-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel于1515年出生在荷兰-拉藍德阿爾布藍德斯瓦阿特时，他的父亲Doen Beijensz van Driel81岁，母亲Haesken77岁。他与Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven在荷兰藍德布盧易尼茲培结婚。他们至少是12个女儿的父母。他去世于1591年在荷兰-拉藍德普爾圖加阿爾享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Driel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

variants.name: Oriol
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Doens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Downes  .

variants.name: Downes
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Down with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (counties Clare and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Irish Gaelic Ó Dubháin (see Doane ).

historicEvents.description: The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.
William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel was born in 1515, in Albrandswaard, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Doen Beijensz van Driel, was 81 and his mother, Haesken, was 77. He married Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven in Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 12 daughters. He died in 1591, in Poortugaal, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel est né en 1515, à Albrandswaard, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Doen Beijensz van Driel, avait 81 ans et sa mère, Haesken, avait 77 ans. Il a épousé Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven à Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zélande, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 12 filles. Il est décédé en 1591, à Poortugaal, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel 1515 in Albrandswaard, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Doen Beijensz van Driel 81 und seine Mutter Haesken 77. Er hat in Zijpe, Bruinisse, Seeland, Niederlande Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Töchter. Er starb 1591 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Poortugaal, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel è nato il nel 1515 nel Albrandswaard, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Doen Beijensz van Driel, aveva 81 anni e il suo madre, Haesken, aveva 77 anni. Lui sposato Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven nel Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figlie. Morì nel 1591, nel Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Cornelisz Doens van Drielが1515年にオランダズイド-hオランドアルブランドスワアルドで生まれた時，父Doen Beijensz van Drielは81歳，母Haeskenは77歳であった。オランダゼエランドブルイニッセズイジペでAleijt Jan Mathijs Dirvenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の娘の親であった。彼は1591年にオランダズイド-hオランドポオルトゥガアルで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel(이)가 1515년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 알브랜드스와아르드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Doen Beijensz van Driel(은)는 81세였고, 그의 어머니 Haesken(은)는 77세였다. 그는 네덜란드 제랜드 브루이니스 지즈에서 Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1591년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 포어투가앨에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel nasceu em 1515, em Albrandswaard, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Doen Beijensz van Driel, tinha 81 anos e sua mãe, Haesken, tinha 77 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven em Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zelandia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1591, em Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 76 anos.

ro.Zijpe: Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Ţările de Jos

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel родился в 1515 г. в местности албрэндсваард, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Doen Beijensz van Driel было 81 год, а матери, которую звали Haesken, 77. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven в местности зиджп, бруинисс, зиланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 12 дочерей. Он умер в 1591 г. в местности пуртугааль, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Cornelisz Doens van Driel nació en 1515, en Albrandswaard, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Doen Beijensz van Driel, tenía 81 años y su mamá, Haesken, tenía 77 años. Se casó con Aleijt Jan Mathijs Dirven en Zijpe, Bruinisse, Zeeland, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijas. Murió en 1591, en Poortugaal, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 76 años.
